heading: This Afternoon
temperature: Upper 30s to mid 40s; low to mid 30s north of Route 2

heading: Thursday Night
text: Snow or a mix near and south of Route 4, chance north to Route 2 late.

heading: Friday
text: Any morning snow south of Route 2 tapering off.

heading: Saturday
text: Spotty freezing rain early north, then chance of rain showers.
